arts.ttl: Out-of-favour Chelsea man to be handed Napoli escape route by Antonio Conte?
arts.sum: Napoli boss Antonio Conte could reportedly offer Chelsea's Carney Chukwuemeka with a January escape route after struggling for playing time at Stamford Bridge.

arts.ttl: Lazio’s complicated pursuit of Jacopo Fazzini: Alternative target Cesare Casadei emerges
arts.sum: The future of Jacopo Fazzini remains uncertain as Lazio step up their efforts to secure the talented midfielder from Empoli. The 21-year-old has become a focal point in a transfer tug-of-war between Lazio and Napoli, with both clubs vying for his signature during the current transfer window The post Lazio’s complicated pursuit of Jacopo Fazzini: Alternative target Cesare Casadei emerges appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Team News: Two changes for Palace as Guéhi returns
arts.sum: Crystal Palace have made two changes from the starting XI that beat Southampton, for our first clash of 2025 against Chelsea on Saturday afternoon.

arts.ttl: Why Crystal Palace vs Chelsea isn't on TV explained as rule blocks Premier League broadcast
arts.sum: Crystal Palace and Chelsea supporters in the UK - without tickets for Saturday afternoon's clash at Selhurst Park - will be unable to watch the action live on TV. However, fans who wish to watch the match live in the UK must have a ticket for the game.
Crystal Palace are in action at Selhurst Park for the first time in 2025, taking on Chelsea – follow live updates from South London below!
